introSection: Magic Carpet (Chinese: 疯狂魔毯) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened with the park on 17 January 2009 and was formerly called Mad Rats (Chinese: 疯狂老鼠).

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back-to-back in two rows of two.

fullText:
Magic Carpet (Chinese: 疯狂魔毯) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened with the park on 17 January 2009 and was formerly called Mad Rats (Chinese: 疯狂老鼠).



Riders sit back-to-back in two rows of two.
